About Me

Turning chaos into clarity for busy teams

I am a results-driven Virtual Assistant with a strong background in executive support, social media management, lead generation, and customer care. I hold a Bachelor of Education from the University of the Cordillera and bring both analytical thinking and creative energy to every project I take on.

Over the years I have had the privilege of working with e-commerce brands, real estate professionals, and growing businesses across different industries. I adapt quickly, communicate proactively, and genuinely care about making the people and teams I support more effective.

Whether it is managing your inbox and calendar, launching a content strategy, nurturing a lead pipeline, or designing brand visuals — I show up with intention and deliver with consistency.

Mission

To help businesses and brands grow with confidence — through organized systems, strategic content, and meaningful client relationships that last.

Vision

To be the go-to virtual partner for entrepreneurs who want to reclaim their time and scale their impact without burning out or losing quality.

Work With Me
WHY
Why Choose Me

Because results
speak louder

As your Virtual Assistant, I focus on staying ahead of trends, using data-driven insights, and bringing creativity to every task. I am not here to simply complete your to-do list — I am here to think alongside you and help your business move forward with intention.

By staying authentic, transparent, and responsive at every step, I aim to build the kind of trust that creates long-term working partnerships — not just one-off projects.

What I Offer

Services built around your real needs

Every business is different. I offer flexible, customized support across six core areas so you get exactly the help you need.

01

Social Media Management

End-to-end content planning, creation, scheduling, and community engagement across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and more. Consistent presence, measurable growth.

02

Executive & Admin Support

Calendar management, email triage, inbox organization, CRM updates, data entry, and document preparation so you can focus on what matters most.

03

Lead Generation

Targeted prospect research, list building, automated outreach campaigns, CRM setup, and lead nurturing workflows that fill your pipeline with qualified opportunities.

04

Customer Support

Professional omnichannel support via phone, email, and live chat. Order management, complaint resolution, and maintaining satisfaction metrics your brand depends on.

05

Brand Development

Branding kits, logo creation, calling cards, and visual identity assets crafted in Canva and Photoshop. Helping new and growing brands look polished and professional.

06

Content & Graphic Design

Scroll-stopping graphics, video reels, caption writing, and email newsletters. Designed to reflect your brand voice and drive real engagement across every platform.

Discuss Your Needs

spans the full
VA spectrum

From frontline customer support to executive-level operations and AI-powered workflows — my background covers every layer of modern virtual assistance.

2025 — 2026
Executive Assistant & Marketing VA
Summit VA Solutions

2024
Lead Generation Specialist & Social Media Manager
Leadsopedia

2020 — 2022

Nichent Health Supply

  • Maintained detailed interaction records and ensured consistent follow-up on all escalated customer cases
  • Consistently met and exceeded monthly satisfaction KPIs across all assigned support channels

Proven Results

Case Studies

Real challenges. Strategic solutions. Measurable outcomes. Here is how I have created impact for real clients.

Case Study 01 — FOL (E-Commerce Brand)

From Manual Tasks to Automated Growth

Problem
Repetitive manual tasks — customer replies, post scheduling, and order updates — were causing delays and team burnout.
Solution
Implemented automation tools for DM responses, content scheduling, and order notifications across platforms.
Outcome
Reduced manual workload, faster response times, and consistent posting without additional labor.
Key Metrics
40%
Less Manual Work
25%
Faster Response
65%
Engagement Increase
Case Study 02 — Instagram Account Growth

Transforming a Stagnant Account Into a Growing Community

Challenge
A lifestyle brand had inconsistent posting, low engagement, and minimal organic reach with no clear content strategy.
Strategy
Built a monthly content calendar, optimized posting times, created branded templates, and implemented active engagement.
Results
Significant growth in reach, engagement, and follower count within the first full content cycle.
Growth Metrics (Before vs After)
+81%
Account Reach
+49%
Engagement
+31.8%
New Followers
Case Study 03 — Leadsopedia (B2B Lead Generation)

Building a High-Converting Lead Machine from Scratch

Problem
The client lacked a systematic lead pipeline. Prospects were scattered, follow-ups were inconsistent, and conversion was low.
Solution
Architected a full CRM database, designed automated email and DM outreach sequences, and segmented leads by intent score.
Outcome
A repeatable, scalable lead generation system that operated consistently with minimal manual intervention.
Outcomes Delivered
3x
Pipeline Growth
60%
Less Manual Outreach
90%
Follow-Up Rate
Case Study 04 — Summit VA Solutions (Real Estate)

AI-Powered Operations for a High-Producing Realtor

Challenge
A busy real estate agent was losing hours each day to admin tasks — calendar chaos, email overload, and outdated property pipelines.
Approach
Took over full calendar management, built an email triage system, streamlined CRM data, and used AI tools to draft client communications.
Impact
The agent reclaimed significant hours weekly, improved client response times, and launched a consistent social media presence.
Efficiency Gains
15+
Hours Saved/Week
2x
Response Speed
100%
On-Time Delivery

How We Work

My process from hello to results

Every engagement starts with understanding your world. Here is what working together looks like, step by step.

1

Business Objectives

You fill out a brief form introducing your business, challenges, and goals so I can understand your brand identity and target audience from the start.

2

Strategy Creation

I build a comprehensive plan aligned with your objectives and identify the KPIs we will track — engagement, reach, conversions, and more.

3

Content Planning

I develop a content calendar and create or curate high-quality content — text, graphics, and video — tailored to your audience and platforms.

4

Your Approval

I send everything for review before anything goes live. Revisions are welcome — we only move forward once you are completely satisfied.

5

Schedule & Engage

Once approved, I schedule posts at optimal times and actively engage with your community before and after each piece goes live.

Start the Process

Your Next Step

Your next great hire is right here

I am available for new client partnerships, retainer arrangements, and project-based work. Let us start with a conversation about what your business truly needs.

Email Me Now View Contact Info
FAQ

Common Questions

Have something specific on your mind? Reach out directly — I am happy to talk through anything before we get started.

Ask Me Directly
I work with entrepreneurs, small business owners, coaches, e-commerce brands, real estate professionals, and marketing agencies. If you need a reliable, skilled VA who can hit the ground running, I am a great fit regardless of your industry.
I am available for both part-time and full-time engagements, and I work across time zones. My primary hours are Philippine Standard Time (PHT), but I am flexible and can accommodate schedules in the US, Australia, UK, and other regions upon agreement.
I treat all client data, communications, and business information with complete discretion. I am happy to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) before beginning any engagement, and I follow secure practices for password and data management at all times.
Both options are available. I offer monthly retainer packages for ongoing support and hourly arrangements for project-based work. We can discuss what structure makes the most sense for your needs during our initial conversation.
In most cases, I can begin within one to three business days after our initial discussion and agreement on scope. For urgent needs, feel free to mention it when you reach out and I will do my best to accommodate a faster start date.
I am proficient with ClickUp, Notion, Trello, Asana, Monday.com, Canva, CapCut, Photoshop, Adobe Premiere, Meta Business Suite, Hootsuite, Buffer, Mailchimp, Flodesk, Google Workspace, Zoom, and multiple CRM platforms. If you use a tool not listed, I learn new platforms quickly.
Absolutely. I send regular progress updates in whatever cadence works best for you. For social media clients, I provide monthly analytics reports showing reach, engagement, follower growth, and content performance against your stated goals.
I bring a rare combination of creative and operational skills — I can manage your calendar, design your brand visuals, run your lead generation, and handle your customers. Most VAs specialize in one area. I give you a true all-in-one partner who understands the full picture of your business and genuinely cares about your growth.
